mapper.select: select ter_sn as terSn, sensor_type as sensorType, module_number as moduleNumber, sensor_config as sensorConfig, sensor_status as sensorStatus, data from ter_sensor_status where ter_sn = #{sn}
select license_number as licenseNumberOne from building_lifeguard bl inner join sys_staff ss on (bl.user_id_one = ss.user_id) where bl.point_id = #{pointId} and ss.staff_position = 'lifeguard'
select license_number as licenseNumberTwo from building_lifeguard bl inner join sys_staff ss on (bl.user_id_two = ss.user_id) where bl.point_id = #{pointId} and ss.staff_position = 'lifeguard'
select license_number as licenseNumberThree from building_lifeguard bl inner join sys_staff ss on (bl.user_id_three = ss.user_id) where bl.point_id = #{pointId} and ss.staff_position = 'lifeguard'
mapper.sql: select id, sn, upc, ter_status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, del_flag, dept_id from ter_info
mapper.select:
select ti.id, ti.sn, ti.upc, CASE WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 16 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 1, 3) WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 18 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 3, 3) ELSE NULL END AS led, CASE WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 16 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 4, 2) WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 18 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 6, 2) ELSE NULL END AS module1, CASE WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 16 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 6, 2) WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 18 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 8, 2) ELSE NULL END AS module2, CASE WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 16 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 8, 2) WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 18 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 10, 2) ELSE NULL END AS module3, CASE WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 16 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 10, 2) WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 18 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 12, 2) ELSE NULL END AS module4, ti.ter_status, tbpi.created_time, ti.del_flag, bpi.building_id, bpi.floor_id, bpi.point_name, bpi.point_x, bpi.point_y, bpi.block, bpi.zone, bpi.zone_sub, bi.name as building_name, bfi.floor_name, ti.gateway, tg.name as gatewayName from ter_info ti LEFT JOIN ter_building_point_info tbpi on (ti.sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (bpi.id = tbpi.point_id and bpi.del_flag='0') left join building_floor_info bfi on (bfi.id = bpi.floor_id) left join building_info bi on(bfi.building_id = bi.id) left join ter_gateway tg on(ti.gateway = tg.sn) inner join sys_dept d on(bi.dept_id=d.dept_id)
ti.del_flag='0' and ti.sn = #{sn} and ti.upc = #{upc} and ti.ter_status = #{terStatus} and ti.gateway = #{gateway} and bpi.building_id = #{buildingId} and bpi.floor_id = #{floorId} and bpi.block = #{block} and bpi.zone = #{zone} and bpi.zone_sub = #{zoneSub} and DATE_FORMAT(tbpi.created_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = STR_TO_DATE(#{createdTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
${params.dataScope} order by sn

select ti.id, ti.sn, ti.upc, CASE WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 16 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 1, 3) WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 18 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 3, 3) ELSE NULL END AS led, CASE WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 16 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 4, 2) WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 18 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 6, 2) ELSE NULL END AS module1, CASE WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 16 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 6, 2) WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 18 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 8, 2) ELSE NULL END AS module2, CASE WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 16 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 8, 2) WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 18 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 10, 2) ELSE NULL END AS module3, CASE WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 16 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 10, 2) WHEN LENGTH(ti.upc) = 18 THEN SUBSTRING(ti.upc, 12, 2) ELSE NULL END AS module4, ti.ter_status, tbpi.created_time, ti.del_flag, bpi.floor_id, bpi.point_name, bpi.point_x, bpi.point_y, bpi.block, bpi.zone, bpi.zone_sub, bi.id as building_id, bi.name as building_name, bfi.floor_name, ti.gateway, tg.name as gatewayName from ter_info ti LEFT JOIN ter_building_point_info tbpi on (ti.sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (bpi.id = tbpi.point_id and bpi.del_flag='0') left join building_floor_info bfi on (bfi.id = bpi.floor_id) left join ter_gateway tg on(ti.gateway = tg.sn) left join building_info bi on(bpi.building_id = bi.id or tg.building_id = bi.id) inner join sys_dept d on(bi.dept_id=d.dept_id)
ti.del_flag='0' and ti.sn = #{sn} and ti.upc = #{upc} and ti.ter_status = #{terStatus} and ti.gateway = #{gateway} and bi.id = #{buildingId} and bpi.floor_id = #{floorId} and bpi.block = #{block} and bpi.zone = #{zone} and bpi.zone_sub = #{zoneSub} and DATE_FORMAT(tbpi.created_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = STR_TO_DATE(#{createdTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
${params.dataScope} order by sn

select ti.id, ti.sn, ti.upc, ti.ter_status, tbpi.created_time, ti.del_flag, bpi.building_id, bpi.floor_id, bpi.point_name, bpi.id as point_id, bpi.point_x, bpi.point_y, bi.name as building_name, bfi.floor_name, ti.gateway, tg.name as gatewayName from ter_info ti LEFT JOIN ter_building_point_info tbpi on (ti.sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (bpi.id = tbpi.point_id and bpi.del_flag='0') left join building_floor_info bfi on (bfi.id = bpi.floor_id) left join building_info bi on(bfi.building_id = bi.id) left join ter_gateway tg on(ti.gateway = tg.sn) inner join sys_dept d on(bi.dept_id=d.dept_id)
ti.del_flag='0' and ti.sn = #{sn} and ti.ter_status = #{terStatus} and ti.gateway = #{gateway} and bpi.building_id = #{buildingId} and bpi.floor_id = #{floorId} and DATE_FORMAT(tbpi.created_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = STR_TO_DATE(#{createdTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
order by sn

select ti.id, ti.sn, ti.upc, ti.ter_status, ti.created_time, ti.updated_time, ti.del_flag, ti.gateway, tg.name as gatewayName, tss.sensor_type, tss.sensor_config, tbpi.point_id from ter_info ti left join ter_gateway tg on (ti.gateway = tg.sn) left join ter_sensor_status tss on (ti.sn = tss.ter_sn) LEFT JOIN ter_building_point_info tbpi on (ti.sn = tbpi.ter_sn) where ti.id = #{id}

select ti.id, ti.sn, ti.upc, ti.ter_status, ti.gateway, ti.created_time, ti.updated_time, ti.del_flag, bpi.point_name, bpi.id as point_id, bpi.point_x, bpi.point_y, bfi.floor_name, bpi.building_id, bpi.floor_id, bpi.linkage_status from ter_info ti LEFT JOIN ter_building_point_info tbpi on (ti.sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (bpi.id = tbpi.point_id and bpi.del_flag = '0') left join building_floor_info bfi on (bfi.id = bpi.floor_id) where ti.del_flag = '0' AND ti.sn = #{sn}
mapper.insert:
insert into ter_info
id, sn, upc, ter_status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, del_flag, dept_id, gateway,
#{id}, #{sn}, #{upc}, #{terStatus}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime}, #{delFlag}, #{deptId}, #{gateway},
mapper.delete:
delete from ter_info where id in
#{id}
